name: sessionAnalytics
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (CollabActionPanel.actSession channel: runDomain → {input:{artifact:{data}}} peeled at dispatch). totalMessages = messages.length; per-participant messages filtered by m.author||m.sender, wordCount sums (m.content||m.text).split; sharePercent = round(pMsgs/total*100); messagesPerMinute = round(total/duration*10)/10 (0 when duration 0); participationBalance = gini over per-participant message counts (sorted asc), round to 2dp; balanceRating < 0.2 well-balanced / < 0.4 slightly-uneven / else dominated-by-few. Fail-CLOSED numerics: duration = Math.max(0, finiteNum(durationMinutes,0)) so 'Infinity'/'NaN'/'12abc' fall to 0 (parseFloat would have leaked Infinity into the durationMinutes field the card renders, or accepted '12abc' as 12). Result card renders totalMessages/balanceRating/participationBalance/messagesPerMinute/participantStats[].{name,sharePercent} EXACTLY (verified field-for-field against CollabActionPanel.tsx 2026-06-28; the page inline panel reads the same flat fields).
